description: Filename stem of the ColorChecker card image (no extension).
Calibration quality band: 'good' (R2>0.85, dE_after<8), 'acceptable' (R2>0.70, dE_after<10), or 'poor'. Blank if status is not 'calibrated'.
Image rotation at which the ColorChecker card was detected (0, 90CW, 180, 90CCW).
Detected patch grid orientation and flip used for the best fit (e.g. 4x6, 6x4_flipLR).
Number of ColorChecker patches used in the correction fit.
Slope of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB L channel.
Intercept of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB L channel.
R-squared of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB L channel.
Slope of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB a channel.
Intercept of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB a channel.
R-squared of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB a channel.
Slope of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB b channel.
Intercept of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB b channel.
R-squared of the linear correction fit for the CIELAB b channel.
Mean Delta E between detected and reference patch Lab values, before correction.
Mean Delta E between corrected and reference patch Lab values, after correction. Values above 10 force a 'poor' quality label regardless of R2.
Free-text note, e.g. 'use day-level fallback' when no checker card was found.
